goal_order: reduce excess body weight in knee-friendly ways

preferences.state_policy: future plans should review prior logged sessions before proposing new sessions
preferences.planning_authority: the agent plans and coaches; local scripts only retrieve candidates and update state
preferences.motivation_policy: plans should stay sustainable, confidence-building, and engaging enough to maintain adherence

sessions.summary: Week-1 return gym session completed with controlled leg press, hip thrust, upper-body work, and dead bugs.
sessions.confidence_note: Completed the first return session with no pain and no swelling, which is a strong early confidence signal.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Easy across 3 sets. Used instead of the planned squat pattern.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Felt medium-heavy. This was above the original suggested start load.

next_session_constraints: Keep the next session controlled and avoid adding both load and knee-dominant volume at the same time.
